headline: Utilidata Raises $40 Million Extension, Completing $100M Series C to Maximize AI Compute Capacity
summary: The added investment from Renown Capital Partners and Keyframe Capital will enable Utilidata to rapidly execute upon its commercial growth strategy and expand its workforceAnn Arbor, MI, May 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Utilidata, a leader in embedded AI for power infrastructure, announced today that it has secured an additional $40 million in Series C funding. The round was led by existing investor Renown Capital Partners with participation from Keyframe Capital, completing the Series C at $100

The round was led by existing investor Renown Capital Partners with participation from Keyframe Capital, completing the Series C at $100
